meaning: n.失职者,违法者adj.失职的,有过失的,违法的,拖欠债务的
examples: Someone would need to pay the $180,000 delinquent tax note at auction.
Lenders of all stripes clearly prefer to foreclose on delinquent borrowers.
That would allow the loan to be classed as "current" rather than "delinquent".
The Internal Revenue Service (IRS) will treat a delinquent loan as a cash withdrawal.
The aim of many delinquent senior managers and board members is to avoid responsibility and accountability.
